label: Lv5 上級ニュアンス
description: イディオム・婉曲・ビジネス上級・ネイティブ感。微妙なニュアンスを操る最終段階。

problems.en: That's a different story.
problems.note: ballgame = 状況。全く別の話。

problems.jp: それは言い過ぎだと思う。
problems.en: I think that's a bit of a stretch.
problems.note: a stretch = こじつけ・言い過ぎ。

problems.en: Take it with a grain of salt.
problems.note: イディオム。鵜呑みにするな。

problems.en: You hit the nail on the head.
problems.note: イディオム。まさにその通り。

problems.jp: それとこれとは別問題。
problems.en: That's beside the point.
problems.note: beside the point = 論点外。

problems.jp: 遠回しに言わないでくれ。
problems.en: Don't beat around the bush.
problems.note: イディオム。はっきり言え。

problems.en: You're digging yourself into a hole.
problems.note: イディオム。状況を悪化させている。

problems.en: There's no turning back now.
problems.note: no turning back = 後戻り不可。

problems.jp: それは時間の問題だね。
problems.en: It's only a matter of time.
problems.note: a matter of time = 時間の問題。

problems.en: That's the official line, anyway.
problems.note: official line = 建前。anyway で含み。

problems.jp: 言わぬが花ってこともある。
problems.en: Sometimes it's better left unsaid.
problems.note: left unsaid = 言わずにおく。

problems.en: Let's not make a big deal out of it.
problems.note: make a big deal = 大ごとにする。

problems.jp: それはこっちのセリフだ。
problems.en: I was about to say the same thing.
alt: You took the words right out of my mouth.
problems.note: 後者はイディオム(先に言われた)。

problems.en: It cuts both ways.
problems.note: cut both ways = 両刃。

problems.en: I'm probably preaching to the choir, but...
problems.note: preach to the choir = 分かってる人に説く。

problems.jp: それはあなたの主観だよね。
problems.en: That's just your take on it.
problems.note: take = 見解(やや突き放し)。

problems.en: Aren't you exaggerating a bit?
problems.note: lay it on thick = 大げさに言う。

problems.jp: とりあえず様子を見よう。
problems.en: Let's play it by ear.
problems.note: play it by ear = 出たとこ勝負/臨機応変。

problems.jp: それはノーコメントで。
problems.en: I'd rather not comment on that.
problems.note: would rather not = 婉曲拒否。

problems.jp: うまい話には裏がある。
problems.en: If it sounds too good to be true, it probably is.
problems.note: too good to be true の定型。

problems.en: That really hit home.
problems.note: hit home = 心に刺さる/痛いところを突く。

problems.en: Don't change the subject.
problems.note: dodge = かわす。

problems.jp: そこは見て見ぬふりするよ。
problems.en: I'll turn a blind eye to that.
problems.note: turn a blind eye = 見て見ぬふり。

problems.jp: 結局は気の持ちようだ。
problems.en: At the end of the day, it's all about mindset.
problems.note: at the end of the day = 結局のところ。

problems.en: I said it in the heat of the moment.
problems.note: in the heat of the moment = カッとなって。

problems.jp: 今のは聞かなかったことに。
problems.en: Let's pretend I didn't say that.
problems.note: pretend = ふりをする。

problems.en: Now I'm starting to see the bigger picture.
problems.note: the bigger picture = 全体像。

problems.en: Could you possibly make an exception?
alt: Is there any way you could help me out?
problems.note: make an exception = 例外を作る。婉曲の懇願。

problems.en: I'll keep that in mind.
problems.note: take to heart = 真剣に受け止める。

problems.jp: 言うは易し行うは難し。
problems.en: Easier said than done.
problems.note: ことわざの定型。
